title: Buttery Turkish Beans
description: A hearty dish of Turkish-style beans in a rich buttery sauce.

ingredients.name: beans
ingredients.amount: 1 can (15 oz) kidney beans, drained and rinsed

instructions: Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in the kidney beans and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Melt the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter in the pan.
Combine the cooked bean and tomato mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
